title: turnera riedeliana
intro: Turnera riedeliana, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or turnera, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and even lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Turnera riedeliana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
